phrases.FS!QRのようなサービスでは、HTTPSによる通信の暗号化と、保存時の暗号化を: Services like FS!QR Code ensure the safety of files by combining HTTPS communication encryption with storage encryption. When sharing encrypted links or passwords, it is important for users to take measures to prevent attackers from gathering the information, such as by transmitting the key information through a separate channel.
phrases.FS!QRのグループ共有機能を活用することで、学習グループ内でのファイル共有が格: By using FS!QR Code's group sharing function, file-sharing within a study group becomes much easier. By sharing reference materials, work progress, meeting minutes, etc. during project learning and research activities, you can create an environment where all members can always access the latest information. Even students in geographically distant locations can instantly share files via QR Code, making it highly useful for remote learning and hybrid classes.
phrases.FS!QRのサイト運営者「こうた」のプロフィールと運営への想いをご紹介します。: Learn about Kota, the developer behind FS!QR Code, and his vision for the service.

phrases.FS!QRの基本コンセプトと設計思想を詳しく解説。QRコードによる直感的な共有体: A detailed explanation of the basic concept and design philosophy of FS!QR Code. Learn about an intuitive sharing experience with QR Codes, a design specifically designed for temporary sharing, and a new way to share files easily and securely.
phrases.FS!QRの基本的な使い方を詳しく解説。QRコードでのファイル共有、ノート共有、: A detailed explanation of the basic usage of FS!QR Code. We will explain in an easy-to-understand manner how to use QR Code file-sharing, note sharing, and group sharing, as well as security measures and precautions for use.

A detailed explanation of the basic usage of FS!QR Code. We will explain in an easy-to-understand manner how to use file-sharing, note sharing, and group sharing using QR Codes, as well as security measures.
phrases.FS!QRの基本的な考え方: The basic concept of FS!QR Code
phrases.FS!QRの基本的な考え方 | サービスコンセプトと設計思想: Basic concept of FS!QR Code | Service concept and design philosophy
phrases.FS!QRの教育現場での活用方法を詳しく解説。授業でのファイル配布、課題提出とフ: Detailed explanation of how to use FS!QR Code in educational settings. We will introduce examples of effective use in schools and universities, such as distributing files in class, submitting assignments and giving feedback, and collaborating in group learning.
phrases.FS!QRの最大の特徴は、QRコードを活用したシンプルな共有プロセスです。ファイ: The biggest feature of FS!QR Code is the simple sharing process using QR Codes. When you upload a file, a QR Code is automatically generated, and the recipient can access the file by simply scanning the code with their smartphone. This mechanism eliminates the need to manually enter URLs or share complicated links, making it possible to exchange files intuitively in educational and business settings.
phrases.FS!QRの業務活用例を詳しく紹介。社内研修・トレーニング、プロジェクト管理、リ: Introducing detailed business usage examples of FS!QR Code. We will explain how to use it effectively and its benefits in business situations, such as in-house training, project management, and file-sharing during remote work.
phrases.FS!QRの横断検索結果ページです。: This is the FS!QR Code cross-search results page.
phrases.FS!QRの機能は、教育機関とビジネス現場での実際のニーズを反映して設計されてい: FS!QR Code's features are designed to reflect the real-world needs of educational institutions and business settings. It is designed to achieve the maximum effect with the minimum number of steps in file-sharing situations that occur on a daily basis, such as distributing materials in classes, sharing results during group work, and distributing training materials at companies. In particular, the group sharing function, which allows multiple people to exchange files, and the note function, which enables information sharing in real time, are innovative functions that are compatible with modern collaborative learning and work styles.
phrases.FS!QRの設計思想や技術的な考え方について、開発背景とコンセプトを詳しく解説し: We will explain in detail the development background and concept of FS!QR Code's design and technical ideas.
phrases.FS!QRの運営者「こうた」の想いや活動を紹介します。: We would like to introduce the thoughts and activities of FS!QR Code operator "Kouta".
phrases.FS!QRは、QRコードを使ってブラウザだけでデータをやり取りできる革新的な共有: FS!QR Code is an innovative web service that lets you exchange files and data directly in your browser using QR Codes. Share data quickly and securely with simple operations.
phrases.FS!QRは、QRコードを使ってブラウザだけでデータをやり取りできる革新的な無料: FS!QR Code is an innovative free file-sharing service that allows you to exchange data using just a browser using QR Codes. Provides secure file-sharing, note sharing, and group sharing functions.
phrases.FS!QRは、お客様のデータの安全性を最優先に考えています。すべてのファイルは暗: FS!QR Code considers the safety of our customers' data to be our top priority. All files are stored encrypted and automatically deleted after a certain period of time. Additionally, data is sent and received safely using HTTPS communication encryption.
phrases.FS!QRは、ユーザーの皆様の個人情報とプライバシーを保護することを重要な責務と: FS!QR Code considers it an important responsibility to protect the personal information and privacy of its users, and has established the following privacy policy.
phrases.FS!QRは、利用者のプライバシーと信頼を最優先に考えた運営を行っています。デー: FS!QR Code operates with the privacy and trust of users as top priority. We maintain as much transparency as possible regarding data handling policies, details of security measures, technical specifications of our systems, etc., and create an environment where users can use our services with peace of mind. In addition, by actively accepting feedback from users and making continuous improvements, we aim to develop file-sharing services that keep up with the changing times.
phrases.FS!QRは、単なるファイル共有ツールを超えて、持続可能なデジタル社会の実現に貢: More than just a file-sharing tool, FS!QR Code aims to contribute to the realization of a sustainable digital society. We value our attitude of contributing to the benefit of society as a whole through technology, such as reducing environmental impact through automatic data deletion, reducing learning costs through simple design, and sharing knowledge based on the spirit of open source. These values ​​are the key elements that differentiate FS!QR Code from other similar services.
phrases.FS!QRは、現代のデジタル社会において「簡単で安全なファイル共有」を実現するた: FS!QR Code is a web service developed to realize "easy and safe file-sharing" in today's digital society. Conventional file-sharing methods require the installation of a dedicated app and complicated settings, but FS!QR Code provides a file-sharing environment that anyone can use intuitively by using a mechanism that can be completed with just a browser.
phrases.FS!QRは「永続的な保存」ではなく「一時的な共有」に特化した設計を採用していま: FS!QR Code is designed specifically for "temporary sharing" rather than "permanent storage." This idea is the result of emphasizing the balance between privacy protection and convenience, creating an environment where users can share files with peace of mind.

phrases.Google DriveはGoogleアカウントが必要で、共有設定の操作を誤ると: Google Drive requires a Google account, and mistakes in sharing settings can expose files unintentionally. FS!QR requires no account and supports one-time sharing with passwords and retention periods.
phrases.AirDropはAppleデバイス同士・近距離のみで使えます。FS!QRはAnd: AirDrop works only between nearby Apple devices. FS!QR works on Android and Windows as long as a browser is available, and files can be shared remotely.
